nasb.text: So I was left alone and saw this great vision; yet no strength was left in me, for my natural color turned to a deathly pallor, and I retained no strength.

esv.text: So I was left alone and saw this great vision, and no strength was left in me. My radiant appearance was fearfully changed,  and I retained no strength.

cnv.text: 因此，只有我一人留下來；我看見了這大異象，就全身無力，臉色大變，一點力氣都沒有。

ccb.text: 只剩下我一人观看这奇异的景象。我浑身无力，脸色苍白，精疲力尽。
